title: NEIGHBORS UNITE MARKETS - 211info
text: ROGUE FOOD UNITES NEIGHBORS UNITE MARKETS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a mobile farmers market and food pantry with fresh, regional organic produce, organic eggs, and natural meats. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: -Tuesday 4pm-6pm The Way Medford Family Church, 2655 S Pacific Highway, Medford, OR 97501 -Wednesday 3pm-5pm Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, 11175 Highway 62, Eagle Point, OR 97524 -Thursday 4pm-6pm Medicap Pharmacy, 49 Talent Avenue, Talent, OR 97540 Email (541) 238-5055 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 238-5055 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in; bring a shopping bag FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Deschutes, Douglas, Jackson, Josephine, and Klamath Counties Services: Farmers Markets Food Pantries Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - DISASTER CASE MANAGEMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
